abstract.t: This document specifies the Agent Discovery Protocol (ADP), a three- layer discovery mechanism for AI Agents that leverages existing Internet infrastructure: DNS TXT and SRV records for lightweight service discovery (Layer 1), Well-Known URIs for machine-readable metadata (Layer 2), and HTML landing pages with WebSocket channels for human interaction and inter-agent communication (Layer 3). ADP enables any domain owner to make their AI Agent discoverable without relying on centralized registries, using the Domain Name System as the decentralized trust anchor.
